replies.msg:
(中文解釋在下方👇)

1. 'Every time' should be written as two words:

I feel happy every time I see you. (✓)
I feel happy everytime I see you. (✗)

2. 'Every time' means 'whenever', so 'when' is unnecessary:

Chris starts swearing every time he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✓)
Chris starts swearing every time when he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✗)

1. 'Every time' 應寫作兩個字:

I feel happy every time I see you. (✓)
I feel happy everytime I see you. (✗)

2. 'Every time' 有「每當」的意思，因此其後不用加上 'when':

Chris starts swearing every time he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✓)
Chris starts swearing every time when he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✗)

#TVB #ThinkBig天地

quote.msg: 此回覆已被刪除

(中文解釋在下方👇)

1. 'Every time' should be written as two words:

I feel happy every time I see you. (✓)
I feel happy everytime I see you. (✗)

2. 'Every time' means 'whenever', so 'when' is unnecessary:

Chris starts swearing every time he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✓)
Chris starts swearing every time when he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✗)

1. 'Every time' 應寫作兩個字:

I feel happy every time I see you. (✓)
I feel happy everytime I see you. (✗)

2. 'Every time' 有「每當」的意思，因此其後不用加上 'when':

Chris starts swearing every time he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✓)
Chris starts swearing every time when he sees Carrie Lam on TV. (✗)

#TVB #ThinkBig天地

冇everytime呢個字 類似意思有everyday 不過意思係常見的

例如係 I sleep every day.
(I turn off the light) every time (I leave the house.) [hypotaxis]
when都係錯 因爲呢個語境下when同every time都係連接詞
兩個連接詞擺埋一齊已經好錯 連意思都唔一樣
when係代表 at/during the time that...
every time比when多咗層意思去表明all occurences(可數)
every time同義詞可以用whenever代替而唔係when

'every time' 點解唔可以用 'when'？
解釋錯嘅人，自己都錯，因為佢對 'every time when...' 呢個用法打交叉

正確講法係，'every time when...' 係一樣可以得，
只不過 'when' 係 optional，用唔用，任君選擇，
唔可以話用咗就係錯

去 corpus 搵吓，大把 'every time when...' 用法，包括外國政府官方文件

原因係 when 呢度當係 relative adverb 用
